scopeCreep: CredentialManager.tsx duplicates ParameterStorePanel functionality (unused standalone component)

results.evidence: TestsPanel.tsx:303-306 renders inline 'No {type} tests yet' when filtered empty, tabs remain visible
TestsPanel.tsx:122-127 filter='all' returns allCases unfiltered, auto-select effect dispatches SELECT_CASE
TestsPanel.tsx:157-247 allCases.length===0 renders full empty state with Create/Generate buttons
TestsPanel.tsx:157,161-177 null evals + evalsError renders error icon and message
ParameterStorePanel.tsx renders credential list with ready/missing status badges
ParameterStorePanel.tsx toggleReveal() now calls api.getParamsRevealed() to fetch real value, displays revealedValues[name] on toggle
integration-routes.ts PUT /api/credentials/:plugin/:skill calls writeCredential(), returns status=ready
credential-resolver.ts:83-89 writeCredential does line-level upsert via regex match
credential-resolver.ts:90-93 appendFileSync for new entries, ParameterStorePanel handleAddParam with uppercased key
TestsPanel.tsx:1319-1481 toggle to integration shows requiredCredentials, platform, chromeProfile fields
TestsPanel.tsx:1345-1364 handleSave spreads testType, requiredCredentials, requirements for integration
TestsPanel.tsx:635-637 renders IntegrationFieldsEditor for integration cases with inline editing
TestsPanel.tsx:519-527 switching to unit destructures away requiredCredentials, requirements, cleanup
WorkspaceContext.tsx:508-518 includes config.provider and config.model in generate request body
api-routes.ts:573-589 testType=integration triggers buildIntegrationEvalPrompt with MCP deps
api-routes.ts:569-571 overrides spread from currentOverrides, absent body fields use defaults

findings.title: CredentialManager.tsx duplicates ParameterStorePanel functionality
findings.issue: Standalone 289-line component duplicates most of ParameterStorePanel. Not wired into any route.
findings.suggestion: Remove CredentialManager.tsx or consolidate in follow-up increment

findings.title: Unit generation replaces all evals; integration merges — asymmetric behavior
findings.issue: Unit path returns full EvalsFile (replaces). Integration path loads existing + merges.
findings.suggestion: Document the asymmetric behavior or align both paths to merge
findings.impact: Users could lose integration tests by regenerating unit tests
